CREATE TABLE test_data (a Array(String), b Array(Int64));
CREATE TABLE additional_data (c Array(String), d Array(Int64));
SELECT maxMap(m.a, m.b) FROM (SELECT a, b FROM test_data UNION ALL SELECT c, d FROM additional_data) AS m;
SELECT maxMap(a, b) FROM (SELECT a, b FROM test_data WHERE b[1] > 1) AS subquery;
SELECT maxMap(k, v) FROM (SELECT ['m', 'n', 'o'] AS k, [1, 4, 2] AS v) AS inner_table;
SELECT maxMap(k, v) FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(['a', 'b']) AS k, arrayJoin([1, 2]) AS v) AS joined_table;
WITH arrayJoin(['x', 'y', 'z']) AS k, arrayJoin([3, 4, 5]) AS v SELECT maxMap(k, v) AS result;
SELECT maxMap(k, v) FROM (SELECT k, v FROM (SELECT ['x', 'y', 'z'] AS k, [1, 5, 3] AS v) AS nested_table) WHERE v > 2;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (keys Array(String), values Array(Int64), category String);
SELECT category, maxMap(keys, values) FROM complex_data GROUP BY category;
